gist.headline: Credit where credit is due
gist.blurb: We've tightened up how BYOP attribution is tracked and saved. Your API keys now perfectly remember who generated what, making sure every app gets its rightful credit.
gist.summary: Fixed an issue with BYOP attribution by persisting the client key ID for verified secret keys and backfilling existing metadata.
gist.impact: Developers using BYOP will now see accurate, persistent app attribution for all generation events tied to their publishable keys.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as an archivist or accountant, organizing glowing golden API keys into a neat filing system to represent accurate attribution and tracking.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, holding a glowing golden key and a small clipboard. She is carefully organizing the key into a neatly labeled wooden filing cabinet. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
